data.body:
PREPLANNING_CONTEXT_v1
{
  "epic_id": "736d-b957",
  "stories": [
    {"id": "a96b-7ba8", "seq": 1, "title": "Foundation: PRECONDITIONS event, minimal tier, flat persistence helpers, brainstorm writer, and restart-rate baseline capture", "walking_skeleton": true},
    {"id": "a497-ee7c", "seq": 2, "title": "First stage-boundary validator at /dso:preplanning with depth-agnostic forward-compat contract and pinned self-verification semantics", "walking_skeleton": true},
    {"id": "86ad-f5e7", "seq": 3, "title": "Depth-tier classifier and standard/deep schema with schema_version field", "walking_skeleton": false},
    {"id": "92a6-52d6", "seq": 4, "title": "Remaining 4 stage-boundary validators: implementation-plan, sprint, commit, and epic-closure", "walking_skeleton": false},
    {"id": "0263-62ba", "seq": 5, "title": "Migrate 4 consumers to PRECONDITIONS, add compaction on epic-closure with ordering contract, and legacy-ticket graceful-degrade", "walking_skeleton": false},
    {"id": "1e71-3886", "seq": 6, "title": "818-bug dry-run coverage harness, p95 benchmarks, FP auto-fallback scope contract, and SC13 workflow-restart analysis", "walking_skeleton": false},
    {"id": "ad8f-3a8a", "seq": 7, "title": "Stage-boundary manifest documentation: schema, validator/consumer guides, ops runbook, pinned contracts", "walking_skeleton": false}
  ],
  "dependency_graph": {
    "a96b-7ba8": [],
    "a497-ee7c": ["a96b-7ba8"],
    "86ad-f5e7": ["a96b-7ba8"],
    "92a6-52d6": ["a497-ee7c", "0263-62ba"],
    "0263-62ba": ["a96b-7ba8"],
    "1e71-3886": ["86ad-f5e7", "92a6-52d6"],
    "ad8f-3a8a": ["1e71-3886"],
    "_note": "Direct edges only. Transitive closure covers all logical dependencies: e.g. ad8f-3a8a transitively depends on every other story via 1e71-3886."
  },
  "success_criteria_coverage": {
    "SC1_flat_file_persistence": ["a96b-7ba8"],
    "SC2_depth_tiers": ["86ad-f5e7"],
    "SC3_field_shapes": ["a96b-7ba8", "86ad-f5e7"],
    "SC4_five_validators": ["a497-ee7c", "92a6-52d6"],
    "SC7_zero_user_interaction": ["a497-ee7c", "92a6-52d6"],
    "SC8_compaction_latency": ["0263-62ba", "1e71-3886"],
    "SC9_818_bug_coverage": ["1e71-3886"],
    "SC10_manifest_depth_contract": ["86ad-f5e7", "ad8f-3a8a"],
    "SC11_self_verification": ["a497-ee7c", "92a6-52d6"],
    "SC12_consumer_migration": ["0263-62ba"],
    "SC13_restart_drop": ["a96b-7ba8", "1e71-3886"],
    "SC14_FP_auto_fallback": ["1e71-3886"]
  },
  "pinned_contracts": [
    {"name": "latest_selection_and_lww", "story": "a96b-7ba8", "summary": "latest = highest timestamp per (stage, session_id, worktree_id); ties by filename lex order; read-side LWW across full event set"},
    {"name": "depth_agnostic_validator", "story": "a497-ee7c", "summary": "validators read only minimal-tier fields; ignore unknown fields; never reject well-formed standard/deep events"},
    {"name": "self_verification_semantics", "story": "a497-ee7c", "summary": "schema-roundtrip + cross-stage chain via event_id reference; chain-of-trust rooted at brainstorm writer's schema check"},
    {"name": "schema_version_evolution", "story": "86ad-f5e7", "summary": "every event carries schema_version; unknown versions fall back to minimal interpretation with one-time warning"},
    {"name": "compaction_ordering", "story": "0263-62ba", "summary": "epic-closure validator runs before compaction; atomic-rename snapshot; reader handles both formats; retry-once on transient miss"},
    {"name": "fp_auto_fallback_scope", "story": "1e71-3886", "summary": "per-write, new events only, per-ticket; existing standard/deep events remain honored; validators stay depth-agnostic"}
  ],
  "risk_register": [
    {"risk": "testing_coverage_of_5_validator_pattern", "stories": ["a497-ee7c", "92a6-52d6", "1e71-3886"]},
    {"risk": "p95_latency_per_entry_point", "stories": ["1e71-3886"]},
    {"risk": "lww_concurrency_under_composite_keys", "stories": ["a96b-7ba8"]},
    {"risk": "4_consumer_migrations_and_future_consumers", "stories": ["0263-62ba", "ad8f-3a8a"]},
    {"risk": "818_bug_corpus_fixture_size", "stories": ["1e71-3886"]},
    {"risk": "fp_fallback_mid_flight_behavior", "stories": ["1e71-3886"]}
  ],
  "adversarial_review": {
    "red_team_findings": 10,
    "blue_team_accepted": 10,
    "blue_team_rejected": 0,
    "disposition_summary": [
      "F1 (Story 2 depth-awareness): absorbed into Story 2 depth-agnostic contract DD",
      "F2 (Story 1 latest-selection semantics): absorbed into Story 1 DDs",
      "F3 (Story 5 compaction+validator ordering): absorbed into Story 5 ordering contract DD",
      "F4 (Story 6 FP fallback scope): absorbed into Story 6 fallback scope contract DD",
      "F5 (Story 4 completion-verifier dual-role): added hard dependency Story 4 -> Story 5",
      "F6 (Story 2 self-verification bootstrap): absorbed into Story 2 self-verification semantics DD",
      "F7 (Story 5 legacy-ticket handling): absorbed into Story 5 graceful-degrade DD + considerations",
      "F8 (Story 1 LWW concurrency model): absorbed into Story 1 LWW reader resolution DD",
      "F9 (Story 3 schema_version): absorbed into Story 3 DD (every event carries schema_version)",
      "F10 (Story 6 baseline timing): split baseline-capture sub-task into Story 1 scope (captured before Story 2 lands)"
    ]
  },
  "tdd_policy": "internal_tooling_exemption — no dedicated TDD stories; each code-change story includes 'unit tests written and passing' DD",
  "ui_stories": [],
  "has_ui": false
}
